# terrible_infinidat_infinibox_infini_users_repository (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of repository

### Optional

- `ad_auto_discover_servers` (Boolean) AD auto discover servers
- `ad_domain_name` (String) AD domain name
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `bind_password` (String) The bind user password
- `bind_username` (String) The bind username
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ldap_port` (Number) LDAP or AD port to use
- `ldap_servers` (String) List of LDAP or AD servers
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `repository_type` (String) The type of repository
- `schema_group_class` (String) Schema group class
- `schema_group_memberof_attribute` (String) Schema group memberof attribute
- `schema_group_name_attribute` (String) Schema group name attribute
- `schema_groups_basedn` (String) Schema groups base DN
- `schema_user_class` (String) Schema user class
- `schema_username_attribute` (String) Schema username attribute
- `schema_users_basedn` (String) Schema user base DN
- `servers` (String) A list of LDAP servers. For an empty list, use [].
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Creates/Modifies users repositories when present or removes when absent. When getting the stats for a users repository, the module will test connectivity to the repository and report the result in 'test_ok' as true or false.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `use_ldaps` (Boolean) Use SSL (LDAPS)

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
